questions: How do Performance 5 practices improve outcomes?
qa.answer: Core practices include: (1) Account simplification and broad targeting, (2) Conversions API to improve signal resilience, (3) Creative diversification and testing, (4) Outcome‑based measurement (experiments/lift), and (5) Adopting business results optimization.
implication: Consolidate structure; use broad with strong signals to exit learning.
Implement CAPI with deduplication; monitor event match quality.
Run ongoing creative testing and use lift studies for validation.
